source_title: DOW-UAP-D60, Mission Report, Persian Gulf, August 2020
description_blurb:
This document is a Mission Report (MISREP), a standardized reporting form the U.S. Military uses to record the circumstances surrounding its operations. U.S. military services often use MISREPs to report Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP) to AARO. The GENTEXT, or “general text” section of these reports often contains important qualitative, contextual information, distinguishing it from the more quantitative, or numerical, data found elsewhere in the report.
A U.S. military operator reported observing one UAP. The report describes the UAP as “transiting” and notes it had “no impact to mission.” The report also states that “dense cloud coverage intermittently impacted FMV collection.”
All descriptive and estimative language contained in this report reflects the reporter’s subjective interpretation at the time of the event. Such characterizations should not be interpreted as a conclusive indication of the presence or absence of any intrinsic object features or performance characteristics.
title: DOW-UAP-D60, Mission Report, Persian Gulf, August 2020
summary: A U.S. military aircraft, callsign [1.4a], conducting ISR operations in the Arabian Gulf, Strait of Hormuz, and Gulf of Oman, observed one UAP at 0726Z. The UAP was described as "transitting" and had "no impact to mission." Dense cloud coverage intermittently impacted Full Motion Video (FMV) collection during the mission, which also involved SIGINT collection.
bust_reasoning: The bust score is 75 because the document provides very limited information about the UAP itself. It was observed by a single aircraft via FMV, described only as '1X UAP' and 'TRANSITTING'. There is no specific physical description, no kinematic data beyond generic movement, and no explicit confirmation of detection by other available sensors (SIGINT, ANDAS4, AH_GMESH) in relation to the UAP. The lack of any anomalous features or multi-sensor corroboration of specific characteristics means that common prosaic explanations remain highly plausible.
full_text:
# DOW-UAP-D60, Mission Report, Persian Gulf, August 2020 - Page 1

Declassified by MG Richard A. Harrison
USCENTCOM Chief of Staff
Declassified on: 20 March 2026

# Misrep 4592219

## Narrative

[redacted] AT 0337Z [1.4a] TOOK OFF FROM OKAS. AT 0359Z [1.4a] HANDED OVER FROM THE LRE. FROM 0434Z TO 2300Z, [1.4a] COLLECTED SIGINT VIA AIRHANDLER. FROM 0513Z TO 2256Z, [1.4a] SUPPORTED NAVCENT TO OPERATION [redacted] [1.4a] IVO ARABIAN GULF, STRAIT OF HORMUZ AND GULF OF OMAN. SEE ISR LINE 1. AT 0726Z, [1.4a] OBSERVED NOTEWORTHY ACTIVITY. SEE OBS LINE 1. AT 2256Z, [1.4a] WAS CLEARED TO RTB. AT 0017Z, [1.4a] HANDED BACK TO THE LRE. AT 0045Z, [1.4a] LANDED AT OKAS. FMV WAS EXPLOITED BY DGS1. 20.3 MISSION HOURS, 17.7 IMINT HOURS, 1 IMINT TASKING PROSECUTED, 18.4 SIGINT HOURS, 1 SIGINT TASKING PROSECUTED, 2 TOTAL TASKINGS PROSECUTED

GENTEXT/ISR
* Gentext: [redacted] [1.4a] COORDINATED WITH NAVCENT 24 HOURS PRIOR TO TAKE OFF. PRECOORD WAS SATISFACTORY. AT 0513Z, [1.4a] ARRIVED ON STATION ISO NAVCENT TO OPERATION [1.4a] TO CONDUCT SCANS FOR IDENTIFIED IRIN\RGCN VESSELS TO ESTABLISH PATTERN OF LIFE, UAS ACTIVITY AND CHARACTERIZE ACTIVITY OUTSIDE OF PORTS. FROM 0513Z TO 2256Z, [1.4a] CONDUCTED SCANS IAW THE TARGET DECK IN THE ARABIAN GULF (AG). AT 0726Z, [1.4a] OBSERVED NOTEWORTHY ACTIVITY. SEE OBS LINE 1. AT 2256Z, [1.4a] WAS CLEARED OFF TASKING AND RETURNED TO BASE (RTB)

ISR ASSET UTILIZATION

* Supported Operation: OPERATION [1.4a]

* Precoord Effectiveness: SATISFACTORY

WEATHER

EFFECTIVENESS

* Total Time On Station: 20 hours 18 minutes

cover_up_reasoning: The cover-up score is 65 due to substantial redactions of key information. The original classification and associated caveats are redacted, indicating a high level of sensitivity. Crucially, the full 'Observed Activity Description' and 'Gentext/Observation' regarding the UAP are redacted beyond the bare minimum ('TRANSITTING' and '1X UAP'), withholding specific details about the observation. Additionally, operational names, specific aircraft identifiers, and precise geographic coordinates are heavily redacted across multiple pages.
summary_zh: 一架呼号为[1.4a]的美国军用飞机在阿拉伯湾、霍尔木兹海峡和阿曼湾执行情报、监视、侦察（ISR）行动时，于0726Z观察到一个UAP。该UAP被描述为“正在通过”，且“对任务无影响”。任务期间，浓密的云层间歇性地影响了全动态视频（FMV）的采集，该任务还涉及信号情报（SIGINT）的采集。
bust_reasoning_zh: 排除可能性评分为75，因为该文件提供了关于UAP本身的非常有限的信息。它由一架飞机通过FMV观察到，仅被描述为“1个UAP”和“正在通过”。没有具体的物理描述，除了通用运动之外没有运动学数据，也没有明确确认其他可用传感器（SIGINT、ANDAS4、AH_GMESH）检测到与UAP相关的信息。缺乏任何异常特征或多传感器对特定特征的证实，意味着常见的平淡解释仍然高度可信。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 掩盖可能性评分为65，原因在于关键信息的大量删节。原始分类和相关注意事项被删节，表明高度敏感性。至关重要的是，关于UAP的完整“观察活动描述”和“通用文本/观察”被删节，超出了最低限度（“正在通过”和“1个UAP”），隐瞒了关于观察的具体细节。此外，行动名称、特定飞机识别码和精确地理坐标在多页中被大量删节。
claims: A UAP was observed by a U.S. military aircraft.
The UAP had "no impact to mission".
Dense cloud coverage intermittently impacted FMV collection.
claims_zh: 一架美国军用飞机观察到一个UAP。
浓密的云层间歇性地影响了FMV的采集。
bust_explanations: Distant aircraft or drone: The object is described only as 'TRANSITTING' and observed via FMV. In an area with high air traffic like the Persian Gulf, an unidentified aircraft or drone, especially if observed at range or through intermittent cloud cover, could easily be classified as a UAP without exhibiting anomalous kinematics.

Weather balloon or surveillance balloon: These objects can be difficult to identify, especially from a distance or at high altitudes. Their movement would typically be 'TRANSITTING' and they might lack distinguishing features when viewed via FMV, making them a plausible UAP candidate.

Atmospheric phenomenon or optical effect: While the report states 'WEATHER WAS NOT A FACTOR' for the observation, it also notes 'DENSE CLOUD COVERAGE INTERMITTANTLY IMPACTED FMV COLLECTION' for ISR. This could contribute to visual ambiguity or misinterpretation of a distant object or a natural atmospheric effect, though less likely than an actual craft.
bust_explanations_zh: 远距离飞机或无人机：该物体仅被描述为“正在通过”，并通过FMV观察到。在波斯湾这样空域繁忙的地区，一架不明飞机或无人机，尤其是在远距离或通过间歇性云层观察时，很容易被归类为UAP，而无需表现出异常运动学特征。
气象气球或侦察气球：这些物体难以识别，尤其是在远距离或高空。它们的运动通常是“正在通过”，并且通过FMV观察时可能缺乏显著特征，使其成为一个合理的UAP候选。
大气现象或光学效应：尽管报告指出观察时“天气不是一个因素”，但它也提到ISR的“浓密云层间歇性地影响了FMV的采集”。这可能导致对远距离物体或自然大气效应的视觉模糊或误解，尽管可能性低于实际飞行器。
cover_up_indicators: Redaction of original classification and associated caveats
Redaction of full 'Observed Activity Description' for the UAP
Redaction of specific aircraft type and tail numbers
Redaction of precise geographic coordinates for the observation location
Sentence-level black-bar redaction across multiple pages
cover_up_indicators_zh: 原始分类和相关注意事项的删节
UAP完整“观察活动描述”的删节
特定飞机型号和尾号的删节
行动名称（“行动[已删节]”）的删节
观察地点精确地理坐标的删节
多页中句子级别的黑条删节
